infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: PranaScan uses your camera to measure wellness indicators like heart rate and respiratory rate. No video is stored or transmitted.
infoPlist.NSMicrophoneUsageDescription: PranaScan uses your microphone to capture a short voice sample for wellness screening. No audio is stored or transmitted.

plugins.cameraPermission: PranaScan uses your camera to measure wellness indicators. No video is stored.

plugins.microphonePermission: PranaScan uses your microphone for a 5-second voice wellness check. No audio is stored.
